title: Finnish Working Life Barometer 2005
description: The annual survey studied employee opinion on the quality of working life in Finland. Main themes were psychosocial working environment, job characteristics, pay systems, job satisfaction, employment security, training and development, capacity to work, and bullying and discrimination at work. The year 2005 survey contained amended and new questions on pay systems.
